title: EQ - Changes to EQ settings are heard in real time
scenario: EQ setting changes (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ sliders) are heard in real time while music is playing, with Custom EQ changes taking effect upon slider release
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected Poly audio device.
3. Tap on Audio Settings, then tap on Equalizer.
4. Play music on the connected Android device.
5. Tap on the 'Bass' preset and listen to the audio output.
6. Tap on the 'Flat' preset and listen to the audio output.
7. Tap on the 'Bright' preset and listen to the audio output.
9. Adjust one of the Custom EQ sliders (e.g., 60 Hz, 230 Hz, 910 Hz, 4 kHz, 14 kHz) and hold it.
10. Release the slider and listen for the change in audio output.
expected: Audio output changes in real time immediately when selecting Bass, Flat, or Bright presets. For Custom EQ, audio changes take effect only when the user releases the slider.
